about.subtitle: About Me
about.title: Senior Full Stack Developer & SEO Specialist
about.bio1: With 10+ years of engineering experience, I build high-performance web applications and SaaS platforms that solve real business problems. My stack spans Laravel, React, Vue, and Django — always paired with data-driven SEO that turns organic traffic into revenue.
about.bio2: I co-built FastCaisse — a multi-restaurant SaaS ordering platform now serving users across Belgium, Singapore, China, and the US, with 34% weekly user growth and 75% organic traffic increase through technical SEO.
about.ctaDesc: Looking for a senior developer who delivers measurable results? Let's talk.

astramind.description: Directed end-to-end development for AstraMind.de on Nuxt 3 and TypeScript, and orchestrated digital transformation of Lindenberg-Apotheke migrating to Next.js 14 with mobile-first Tailwind CSS.
achievements: SEO architecture with Schema.org markup and i18n for the German market
Secure healthcare integrations using Nodemailer, EmailJS, and Cloudflare Turnstile
99.9% availability via Netlify and Vercel deployment with pnpm and Git
25% decrease in bounce rates with Framer Motion interactive UI

fastcaisse.description: Architected and executed SEO strategies and full-stack solutions for a restaurant SaaS platform. Delivered measurable improvements in organic search rankings, site speed, and mobile responsiveness.
achievements: Improved organic traffic and search rankings through keyword analysis and content optimization
Full-stack solutions using Node.js, Laravel, and PHP with measurable speed gains
Reduced customer acquisition costs and increased conversion rates via competitive analysis

emtethal.description: Built responsive web applications using Django and ReactJS, translating Figma designs into pixel-perfect production UIs. Architected scalable RESTful APIs and integrated third-party services.
achievements: Pixel-perfect UI from Figma designs using Django and ReactJS
Scalable RESTful APIs reducing backend response time
Third-party service integrations improving data reliability

hexabitz.description: Engineered a web-based IDE using Laravel and Babylon.js for IoT & AI hardware projects, enabling real-time device interaction. Built sensor data visualization dashboards improving engineering efficiency.
achievements: Browser-based IDE for IoT hardware with real-time device interaction
Sensor data visualization dashboards for hardware debugging
Improved hardware debugging efficiency for engineering teams

seetah.description: Delivered full-stack web and SEO solutions using Laravel and CodeIgniter, increasing client website visibility in the Riyadh market through server-side optimizations.
achievements: Increased website visibility in the Riyadh market
Server-side JavaScript optimizations reducing page load times significantly

bonzuttner.description: Developed modular Django web applications following DRY principles, producing reusable and maintainable code. Collaborated in Agile cross-functional engineering teams.
achievements: Modular Django applications following DRY principles
Delivered web solutions on schedule in Agile environment

fastcaisse.subtitle: Multi-Restaurant Ordering System
fastcaisse.description: How I built and scaled a multi-restaurant SaaS ordering platform from zero to users in 4 countries using Laravel, Vue 3, and technical SEO.

fastcaisseDetail.heroTitle: FastCaisse: Building a Multi-Restaurant SaaS Platform with 34% Weekly User Growth
fastcaisseDetail.heroDesc: A complete story of engineering a scalable ordering system from scratch — and driving global organic visibility with technical SEO.

problem.intro: Restaurant owners in Belgium were struggling with fragmented ordering solutions — each location managing separate menus, payment providers, and delivery zones. There was no unified, multi-restaurant SaaS platform serving the French, Dutch, and Arabic-speaking market with kiosk support.
bullets: No multi-restaurant management from a single admin panel
No SEO-optimized marketing pages to drive organic traffic
No kiosk/self-service ordering mode
Fragmented payment and delivery integrations

strategy.intro: The architecture was designed around three core pillars: scalability, multi-tenancy, and SEO.

architecture.title: 🏗️ Architecture
items: Laravel multi-tenant backend with restaurant isolation
Vue 3 SPA for ordering UI with Composition API
Nuxt 3 SSR for SEO-optimized marketing pages

payments.title: 💳 Payments & Integrations
items: Print receipt API for kiosk mode

results.positioningQuote: Built and scaled FastCaisse, a multi-restaurant SaaS platform generating 34% weekly user growth and 75% organic traffic increase through technical SEO and performance optimization — achieving cross-country organic visibility in under 12 months.

cta.title: Need Similar Results for Your Project?

seoServices.subtitle: SEO Services
seoServices.title: Technical SEO That Drives Revenue
seoServices.description: I don't just fix broken links — I build organic growth engines. As an SEO Specialist with a developer background, I deliver what agencies can't: deep technical audits + full implementation.

audit.title: Technical SEO Audit
audit.description: Full crawl analysis, Core Web Vitals optimization, indexation issues, schema markup review, and internal linking strategy. I find what's hurting your rankings and fix it.

speed.title: Page Speed Optimization
speed.description: I write the code myself. No handoff to another team. Reduce LCP, eliminate CLS, optimize TTFB, lazy-load assets, and implement modern image formats.

onPage.title: On-Page SEO & Content Strategy
onPage.description: Keyword research, search intent mapping, optimized content briefs, H1/H2 hierarchy, and semantic HTML implementation.

international.title: International & Multilingual SEO
international.description: Hreflang implementation, GBP optimization, multi-language URL structure, and country-specific targeting. Proven results for Arabic + European markets.

analytics.title: SEO Analytics & Reporting
analytics.description: GA4 setup, Search Console configuration, custom dashboards, and monthly reporting with actionable insights — not just vanity metrics.

full.title: Full SEO Implementation
full.description: The full package: audit + implementation + monitoring. Best for businesses that want results without managing multiple agencies.

faster.title: Faster Implementation
faster.desc: I write code. No waiting on developers to implement recommendations.

technical.title: Technical Depth
technical.desc: I can debug crawl issues, fix server configs, and optimize database queries.

data.title: Data-Driven
data.desc: Every decision backed by GA4, Search Console, and crawl data.

direct.title: Direct Communication
direct.desc: No account managers. You talk directly to the person doing the work.

faq.q1: What makes you different from an SEO agency?
faq.a1: I'm a developer first. I don't hand off recommendations to a dev team — I implement them myself. That means faster execution, no miscommunication, and direct accountability for results.
faq.q2: Can you work on non-English sites?
faq.a2: Yes. I have hands-on experience with Arabic (RTL), French, Dutch, and German websites. I've implemented hreflang setups for multi-country SaaS platforms.
faq.q3: How long until I see results?
faq.a3: Technical fixes often show results in 4–8 weeks. Content and authority-building strategies typically take 3–6 months. I provide transparent reporting throughout.
faq.q4: Do you work with WordPress sites?
faq.a4: Yes. I'm certified in WordPress SEO and have worked with WooCommerce, PrestaShop, and custom Laravel/Nuxt applications.

seoServices.ctaTitle: Ready to Grow Your Organic Traffic?
seoServices.ctaDesc: Get a free 30-minute SEO audit call. I'll analyze your site and give you actionable insights — no strings attached.

gdpr.title: We value your privacy
gdpr.description: We use cookies to analyze site traffic and improve your experience. By accepting, you consent to our use of Google Analytics.

privacyPolicy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for azzamazizali.sy — how we collect, use, and protect your data in compliance with GDPR.
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Azzam Aziz Ali ("we", "us") collects, uses, and protects information when you visit azzamazizali.sy. We are committed to compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable privacy laws.
privacyPolicy.controllerText: The data controller responsible for your personal data is:
privacyPolicy.name: Name
privacyPolicy.dataCollectedText: When you visit this website, the following data may be collected automatically through Google Analytics (only with your consent):
privacyPolicy.dataItem4: Pages visited, time spent, and navigation path
privacyPolicy.dataContactForm: If you use the contact form, we also collect your name, email address, phone number (optional), and message content for the sole purpose of responding to your inquiry.
privacyPolicy.purpose1: To analyze website traffic and improve user experience (Google Analytics — with consent only)
privacyPolicy.purpose2: To respond to contact form inquiries
privacyPolicy.purpose3: To remember your cookie preference and color mode setting
privacyPolicy.legalBasisText: We process your data under the following legal bases (GDPR Art. 6):
privacyPolicy.legalBasisConsentDesc: Analytics cookies are only set after you explicitly accept via the cookie banner.
privacyPolicy.legalBasisLegitimateDesc: Storing your theme preference and cookie consent choice to provide a consistent experience.
privacyPolicy.cookiesText: This website uses the following cookies:
privacyPolicy.cookieGaPurpose: Distinguish users and sessions for analytics (set only with consent)
privacyPolicy.thirdPartyText: We use the following third-party services that may process your data:
privacyPolicy.gaDesc: Analytics service by Google. Data is processed in accordance with Google's Privacy Policy —
privacyPolicy.netlifyDesc: Hosting and serverless functions provider. See
privacyPolicy.retentionText: Google Analytics data is retained for 14 months by default. Contact form submissions are not stored persistently on our servers. Cookie preference data stored locally in your browser persists until you clear your browser storage.
privacyPolicy.rightsIntro: If you are located in the EU/EEA, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacyPolicy.rightAccess: Right of access — request a copy of your data
privacyPolicy.rightRectification: Right to rectification — correct inaccurate data
privacyPolicy.rightErasure: Right to erasure — request deletion of your data
privacyPolicy.rightRestriction: Right to restriction — limit how we process your data
privacyPolicy.rightWithdraw: Right to withdraw consent at any time
privacyPolicy.rightsContact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at
privacyPolicy.consentManageText: You can withdraw or change your cookie consent at any time by clearing your browser's local storage, or by using your browser's built-in cookie management tools. Withdrawing consent will not affect the lawfulness of processing based on consent before withdrawal.
privacyPolicy.childrenText: This website is not directed at children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.
privacyPolicy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page indicates when the policy was last revised. Continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPolicy.contactText: For any privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, please contact:
